/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libelevated_control.so -o libelevated_control.so CMakeFiles/elevated_control.dir/src/arm_interface.cpp.o CMakeFiles/elevated_control.dir/src/joint_admittance.cpp.o CMakeFiles/elevated_control.dir/src/velocity_filter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/elevated_control.dir/src/config_parsing.cpp.o CMakeFiles/elevated_control.dir/src/dynamic_sim.cpp.o  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libspdlog.so.1.12.0 libelevated_soem.a -lyaml-cpp -lpthread -lrt /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfmt.so.9.1.0
